content.en:
Thousands of rivers of heavy water.

Ye Tian swallowed an immortal golden pill before entering a thousand heavy waters, if he didn't take an immortal golden pill, once he entered a thousand heavy waters, he would be crushed into powder by the pressure of thousands of heavy waters, and even immortal talents, healing talents and other recovery talents could not save his life.

Only under the protection of the Immortal Golden Pill could he survive the thousands of heavy waters, and operate the Tianyuan True Law to impact the fourth layer realm.

Ye Tian swallowed an immortal golden pill, and opened all the talents such as immortal talent and healing talent, and then walked into the river of thousands of waters.

As soon as he stepped into the thousands of heavy waters, an unimaginable pressure surged, as if it was about to squeeze Ye Tian into powder in an instant, but at this time, all kinds of talents and the power of the Immortal Golden Pill emerged, protecting Ye Tian and saving Ye Tian's immortal body from collapse.

At this time, the power of the Immortal Golden Pill was rapidly depleted, and at this rate of consumption, it would be impossible to continue to hold on for a day at most.

"Cultivating the fourth layer of the Heavenly Yuan True Law!"

Ye Tian hurriedly mobilized the cultivation method of the Tianyuan True Method, and began to absorb the power of a thousand heavy waters, condensing a thousand heavy water marks in his body, which was an indispensable link.

Soon, a day passed, and Ye Tian still hadn't condensed a thousand watermarks, so he swallowed another immortal golden pill.

In this way, day by day, it took about six days, and Ye Tiancai finally barely condensed a thousand watermarks.

"Hurry up and go to the land of a thousand weak waters!"

Ye Tian rushed out of the thousands of rivers and went to the land of thousands of weak waters.

Soon, he came to the Thousand Heavy Weak Water Lake, came to the edge of the lake, and submerged in the lake.

In the thousand layers of weak water, Ye Tian's body corroded at an extremely fast speed, but the power of the Immortal Golden Pill protected Ye Tian and allowed Ye Tian's body to recover quickly.

Corroded, restored, re-corroded, re-restored......

Ye Tian's body has been in such a state, repeatedly, but on the whole, there is no big problem.

"Hurry up and practice!"

Ye Tian ran the fourth layer of the Tianyuan True Method, and began to absorb the power of the Thousand Weak Water, trying to condense the Thousand Weak Water Mark.

Once the Thousand Weak Watermarks and the Thousand Heavy Watermarks are gathered, one can truly transform the body and reach the fourth level of the Tianyuan True Law.

The body corresponding to the fourth level realm of the Tian Yuan True Law is also called the Tian Yuan Immortal Body, which has an eternal lifespan, of course, this eternity refers to the life span that is on par with the universe, but if the universe is destroyed, even if you have the Tian Yuan Immortal Body, you will die.

Therefore, the lifespan possessed by the fourth layer of the Tianyuan True Law is only equivalent to an era of the universe, and if it cannot transcend the universe, it cannot have a lifespan beyond an epoch.

Cultivating in a thousand weak waters was an extremely painful thing, but in order for Ye Tian to gain a lifespan comparable to that of a cosmic god, he had to do so.

After the Immortal Golden Pills were consumed one after another, and after consuming about eight Immortal Golden Pills, Ye Tian finally condensed a Thousand Weak Water Marks.

At this time, Ye Tian already had a thousand heavy watermarks and a thousand weak watermarks at the same time.

The next step is a crucial step, that is, to fuse the Thousand Weak Watermark and the Thousand Heavy Watermark to form the Tian Yuan True Water, and use the Tian Yuan True Water to wash the whole body, casting the Tian Yuan Immortal Body, with a near-eternal lifespan.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian urged the Thousand Weak Watermark and the Thousand Heavy Watermark to let the two begin to slowly merge.

Rumble!!!!

The Thousand Heavy Watermark and the Thousand Weak Watermark merged, and the transformation began.

At this time, Ye Tian's powerful body seemed to be shattered, and in desperation, he had no choice but to take another immortal golden pill.

Time passed, and the metamorphosis became more and more drastic.

Nearly two days have passed, and the Thousand Weak Watermarks and the Thousand Heavy Watermarks have achieved a perfect fusion, gradually forming a drop of water in the body that is almost nothing.

This drop of water is Tianyuan real water!

When Ye Tian urged the fourth layer of the Tianyuan True Law, the Tianyuan True Water exploded, turning into a large amount of water to envelop Ye Tian, wrapping Ye Tian into a water ball.

The real metamorphosis begins!

At this time, Ye Tian gradually changed the physique of his body under the wrapping of Tianyuan True Water, so that his body evolved towards Tianyuan Immortal Body, once the evolution was successful, Ye Tian was a fourth-order life, with the same lifespan as the cosmic god, unless the universe was destroyed, he would hardly die.

At that time, he will no longer need to worry about lifespan, and methods such as the Blade of Time will not have much effect on him.

I don't know how long it took, Ye Tian finally succeeded in his transformation, transforming from a third-order life to a fourth-order life.

When the transformation was successful, Ye Tian's side was filled with an inextinguishable golden light.

The immortal golden light is a vision that only appears when a galaxy-level powerhouse hits the cosmic god, and it is also one of the unique signs of eternal life.

And Ye Tian is now considered one of the eternal lifeforms, that is, the fourth-order lifeforms.

Ye Tian's heart moved, and the immortal golden light was retracted.

Through his divine sense, he could clearly see that the countless cells in his body contained inextinguishable light, which represented his eternal immortality.

After becoming a fourth-order life, Ye Tian felt that his body was very empty, and he was far from reaching the limit of the god level.

His immortal power, immortal body, and immortal soul still have huge room for improvement.

"Go back first, in case the impact of the Son of Era has a huge vision, it will be too dangerous here!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As a result, Ye Tian left the Blue Water Realm and returned to the Xuan-level area of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

As soon as he came back, Ye Tian asked the Dark Lord to send a message to Kunwu Supreme, he wanted to impact a new realm, in case there was a vision, please ask the Supreme Level to block the vision in time.

After doing all this, Ye Tian entered a state of retreat.

......

In the Xuan-level area, in the endless void, the three supremes of Kunwu Supreme, Qinghuang Supreme, and Absolute Spell Supreme gathered here, staring closely at the cultivation tower where Ye Tian was retreating.

"Kunwu Supreme, Ye Tian said that he was going to impact a new level, what does this mean? If it is said to be a true god level, it is at most a thunder tribulation, if you hide in one place to cross the tribulation, there will be nothing at all, why do you want to suppress the vision?"

The Blue Emperor Supreme asked curiously.

Kunwu Supreme said: "I guess it should be a realm above the Supreme Highness, according to my understanding, Ye Tian has reached the top Supreme Highness combat power, and then it is to break the Supreme Highness's combat power." "

"Isn't the combat power of His Royal Highness the highest of the same level, and are there other levels above it?"

The Spell Supreme is curious.

"Of course there is, have you forgotten the Yuan Gu Palace? even if it is a supreme-level highness, he will not dare to break through the heaven-level difficulty, once he breaks through, he will almost definitely die. And judging from some records of the Yuan Gu Palace, His Royal Highness is only the limit of our cosmic era, but not the limit of all cosmic eras, and above the combat power of His Royal Highness the Supreme Level, there is even more terrifying combat power! I once saw a name in the inheritance of a mysterious monument - the son of the era! It is said that the son of the era is a terrifying genius that is difficult to give birth to in a cosmic era!"

"The Son of the Era, Kunwu Supreme, do you mean that Ye Tian is attacking the Son of the Era!!"

The Blue Emperor Supreme was shocked.

"It's possible!" Kun Wu Supreme nodded, "If that's the case, Ye Tian's future potential is unimaginable!"

The Blue Emperor Supreme and the Absolute Spell Supreme nodded again and again, and they were also full of anticipation for Ye Tian's impact.

In the cultivation tower.

Ye Tian continued to increase the total amount of immortal power and the immortal power after compression and improvement, and also used the third and fourth sets of movements of the Eighteen Golden Body Recipes to improve the strength of his body again, and also used the soul liquid to continue to refine the immortal soul.

In short, Ye Tian did whatever it took to raise himself to the limit of the god level again.

The god-level limit of the fourth-order life is far beyond the imagination of ordinary people.

Every moment, Ye Tian's strength is growing.

Suddenly, at some point.

Ye Tian seemed to have broken a certain boundary, and his consciousness seemed to have entered the void at a certain moment, overlooking the entire Xuan-level region, the entire Terran Supreme Hall, the entire Holy Domain, and even the entire Terran Race.

......

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian seems to have entered the God Mode, overlooking the countless regions of the universe with a supreme gaze.

But soon, Ye Tian's consciousness returned to his body.

At the same time, Ye Tian's body released an infinite golden light, illuminating the entire Xuan-level area, and gradually shining towards the outside of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

"Not good!"

Kunwu Supreme's face changed slightly, in the midst of the endless void.

Ye Tian's vision was so amazing, in just an instant, it spread all over the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and even the Hidden Places couldn't stop the golden light from shining, if it continued to shine like this, wouldn't it be difficult to stop the golden light even in the entire Holy Domain, and even more distant places.

This vision is too amazing, it will definitely cause the investigation of the alien race, maybe it will cause many powerful supreme deductions, if it is deduced to Ye Tian, it will not be good.

Immediately, Kunwu Supreme made a move.

He blocked the golden light with his supreme power, and finally succeeded in suppressing the golden light vision.

As a result, the golden light was confined to the supreme hall of the human race.

"The Blue Emperor Supreme, the Absolute Curse Supreme, I'll say later, this is a secret technique that we are experimenting with, and if we accidentally radiate to the Supreme Hall of the entire Human Race, we must not leak the secret of Ye Tian's impact on the son of the era!"

Kunwu Supreme admonished.

"Understood!"

The Blue Emperor Supreme and the Absolute Curse Supreme nodded again and again.

At this moment, the three supremes had already confirmed that Ye Tian had successfully attacked the son of the era, otherwise there would not have been such an astonishing vision.

As time passed, the golden light began to dim and fade away.

The vision disappeared, and Ye Tian slowly opened his eyes.

At this moment, he is no longer the son of the universe, but the son of the era, and the son of the first era of this universe!
